name: claudient
description: The Claude Code knowledge system — 380+ skills, 182+ agents, 50 professional workspace stacks, 100+ commands, 40 hooks, 32 rules, MCP configs, and project structures across every professional domain.

plugins.name: claudient-ai-engineering
plugins.description: Claude API, agent construction, RAG, LangGraph, CrewAI, MCP server building, prompt caching, LLM eval, and AI-native development patterns.

plugins.name: claudient-automation
plugins.description: Browser automation, Playwright, SaaS scaffolding, spec-to-repo generation, IoT, embedded systems, game dev, and office document automation.

plugins.name: claudient-backend
plugins.description: 41 framework-specific skills covering Python (FastAPI, Django), Node.js (Next.js, NestJS, Hono, tRPC), Go, Rust, Ruby on Rails, Java Spring Boot, Elixir, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin, .NET, and PHP Laravel.

plugins.name: claudient-data-ml
plugins.description: Data pipelines, dbt, Apache Spark, Kafka, MLOps, MLflow, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP pipelines, pandas/polars, reinforcement learning, and synthetic data generation.

plugins.name: claudient-database
plugins.description: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase, Neon, Turso, Prisma, Drizzle ORM, GraphQL, Elasticsearch, and blockchain/smart contracts.

plugins.name: claudient-devops-infra
plugins.description: 36 skills covering AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, Pulumi, ArgoCD, Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, secrets management, observability, SLOs, and platform engineering.

plugins.name: claudient-finance
plugins.description: DCF models, 3-statement financial models, comps analysis, deal screening, IC memos, KYC/AML, pitch decks, earnings analysis, GL reconciliation, and financial planning.

plugins.name: claudient-finance-payments
plugins.description: Stripe integration and webhook security patterns for payment processing.

plugins.name: claudient-git
plugins.description: Commit message writing, PR description generation, and changelog automation.

plugins.name: claudient-gtm
plugins.description: 32 GTM skills: cold email, LinkedIn outreach, deal desk, revenue operations, HubSpot, channel economics, commercial forecasting, customer success, RFP response, and SDR workflows.

plugins.name: claudient-legal
plugins.description: Contract review, NDA analysis, GDPR compliance, SOC 2, ISO 27001, IP clearance, EU AI Act, legal research (CourtListener, Thomson Reuters), DSAR response, and diligence review.

plugins.name: claudient-marketing
plugins.description: SEO (technical, AI, programmatic), content strategy, copywriting, email sequences, paid ads, brand guidelines, CRO, social media, churn prevention, schema markup, and referral programs.

plugins.name: claudient-product
plugins.description: Product discovery, roadmapping, PRD writing, competitive teardowns, UX research, product analytics, experiment design, and landing page generation.

plugins.name: claudient-productivity
plugins.description: 66 skills for daily engineering work: debugging, refactoring, code review, PR automation, test generation, ADR writing, security auditing, context engineering, MCP clients, and dozens more.

plugins.name: claudient-sdr
plugins.description: SDR-specific skills: cold call scripts, email sequences, ICP scoring, objection handling, LinkedIn SDR, MEDDPICC qualification, personalization, CRM hygiene, and prospect research.

plugins.name: claudient-small-business
plugins.description: 47 skills for small business operations: cash flow forecasting, invoicing, campaign briefs, QuickBooks workflows, Shopify operations, SOP writing, job descriptions, and weekly business pulse.

plugins.name: claudient-commands
plugins.description: 100+ slash commands across git, testing, refactor, docs, debug, devops, database, security, frontend, api, ai-engineering, and productivity.

plugins.name: claudient-personas
plugins.description: 10 operating personas for Claude: startup-cto, solo-founder, growth-marketer, indie-hacker, enterprise-architect, data-driven-pm, devrel-advocate, agency-operator, ai-product-builder, fractional-exec.

plugins.name: claudient-everything
plugins.description: Meta-bundle listing all Claudient domain plugins (380+ skills, 182+ agents). Install individual plugins: claudient-ai-engineering, claudient-automation, claudient-backend, claudient-data-ml, claudient-database, claudient-devops-infra, claudient-finance, claudient-finance-payments, claudient-git, claudient-gtm, claudient-legal, claudient-marketing, claudient-product, claudient-productivity, claudient-sdr, claudient-small-business. See README.md for install commands.
